cleavage agent: we used the protease LysC, for 2nSILAC trypsin or a combination of both proteases
fractionation method: were fractionated (8 fractions) by high pH reversed-phase chromatography
instrument: analyzed on an LTQ Orbitrap XL or a Q Exactive Plus mass spectrometer
labeling: stable isotope labeling by amino acids in cell culture (SILAC), termed 2nSILAC
